memoryArtifacts.headline: The Garrett Family in England.pdf
memoryArtifacts.description: This extensive research appears to have been completed by John E. Garrett Jr. who also provided the Garrett Family Genealogy attached in several of the same records. Everyone in this document is not yet tagged. Link - https://www.yumpu.com/en/document/read/20936828/the-garretts-in-england-garrett-family-genealogy

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
The Lawrence Garrard (aka Gerrard, Garard) who died in October 1500 in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, was not the son of Thomas Gerard of Brynhill, Lancashire, England, as shown by his and his father's last wills, filed in County Kent, England. 

It is likely this profile is a "conflation" of 2 different people - birth data for Lawrence Gerrard of Lancashire vs. the death data for Lawrence Garrard of Kent. The Will also indicates that John Garrard, here listed as Lawrence's son, may have been his younger brother instead. Only 2 sons are listed in Lawrence & Agnes' wills: Thomas and William Garrard.

According to these primary documents, Lawrence of Sittingbourne married a woman named Agnes and they had 2 sons: Thomas, the older; then William, plus 2 daughters (only named in Agnes' will): Alice and Isabelle.

Lawrence Garrard died on 16 October 1500 and was buried next to his father in "Our Lady Chancel" of the Sittingbourne (aka Sydyngborn) church in Kent.

nameMeanings.name: Garrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gerard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

variants.name: Garrett
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Gerad, a variant of either Gerald or Gerard .

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence Garrad was born on 8 July 1447, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Gerard, was 15 and his mother, Lady Douce Ashton, was 16. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Sara Eppes. He died on 16 October 1500, in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence Garrad est né le 8 juillet 1447, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Gerard, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Douce Ashton, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Sara Eppes. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1500, à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lawrence Garrad am 8. Juli 1447 in Warwick, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Gerard 15 und seine Mutter Lady Douce Ashton 16. Er hatte mit Lady Sara Eppes mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1500 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence Garrad è nato il il 8 luglio 1447 nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Gerard, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Lady Douce Ashton, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Sara Eppes. Morì il 16 ottobre 1500, nel Sittingbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence Garrad(이)가 1447년 7월 8일 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Gerard(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Douce Ashton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Lady Sara Eppes(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 10월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 짓틴그보우른에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.
